name: Auto Jump
description: Automatically walk up 1–2 block height increments without the need to press jump.

name: Curse of Blindness
description: Inflicts the Blindness status effect on the player while worn.

name: Curse of Glowing
description: Grants the wearer a permanent glowing outline, making them visible through walls.

name: Curse of Mining Fatigue
description: Drastically slows down mining speed when the tool is held.

name: Curse of Poison
description: Periodically poisons the wearer, slowly draining health.

name: Curse of Slowness
description: Permanently reduces movement speed while this armor is equipped.

name: Curse of Sound
description: Emits distracting or eerie sounds periodically while the sword is in use.

name: Curse of Unluck
description: Permanently lowers the player's Luck attribute, affecting loot quality.

name: Ally Item Display
description: Summons an Allay specifically for displaying and holding items within an item frame.

name: Loyalty Speed
description: Enhances the speed at which the Trident returns to its owner after being thrown.

name: Water Breathing
description: Occasionally grants the player the Water Breathing effect when submerged.

name: Aura Blue
description: Displays a circular Blue particle effect around the player's feet while wearing boots.

name: Aura Green
description: Displays a circular Green particle effect around the player's feet while wearing boots.

name: Aura Orange
description: Displays a circular Orange particle effect around the player's feet while wearing boots.

name: Aura Purple
description: Displays a circular Purple particle effect around the player's feet while wearing boots.

name: Aura Red
description: Displays a circular Red particle effect around the player's feet while wearing boots.

name: Aura RGB
description: Displays a cycling RGB circular particle effect around the player's feet while wearing boots.

name: Aura Yellow
description: Displays a circular Yellow particle effect around the player's feet while wearing boots.

name: Flame Sword
description: Creates a fiery ring of particles around an entity when struck by this sword.

name: Fire Resistance
description: Provides the player with complete immunity to fire and lava damage while worn.

name: Head Cosmetic
description: Right-click the ground to wear various decorative blocks (Glass, Banners, etc.) as headwear.
apply_on: Dispenser, Dropper, Vault, Observer, Spore blossom, mangrove roots, Any lantern, Flowering azalea, Azalea, Bone, End rod, Lightning rod, Amethyst cluster, Scaffolding, Honey block, Slime block, Spyglass, Any Glass, Any leaves, Any copper grate, Any Color Banner

name: Invisible Item Frame
description: Renders the item frame completely invisible, leaving only the displayed item visible.

name: Night Vision
description: Grants the player permanent Night Vision while the helmet is equipped.

name: Baby Mode
description: Transforms the player into baby mode, significantly shrinking their size while active.

name: Copper Generator
description: Summons a magical fox that produces Copper when near a Copper block.

name: Jump Boost
description: Permanently increases jump height while wearing these boots (up to Level 3).

name: Livestock Slayer
description: Deals significantly increased damage to livestock mobs (Cow, Sheep, Pig, Chicken).

name: Pet Glow
description: Applies a permanent glowing effect to your pets (Horses/Wolves).
apply_on: Any Horse Armor, Any Nautilus Armor, Wolf Armor

name: Pet Jump
description: Increases the jump height of your pets when equipped with armor.
apply_on: Any Horse Armor, Any Nautilus Armor, Wolf Armor

name: Poison Aspect
description: Inflicts a Poison status effect on enemies when struck; incompatible with Fire Aspect.

name: Speed Boost
description: Provides a permanent increase to the player's movement speed (up to Level 3).

name: Auto Beetroot Planter
description: Automatically replants beetroot seeds from your inventory while walking over tilled farmland.

name: Auto Wheat Planter
description: Automatically replants wheat seeds from your inventory while walking over tilled farmland.

name: Coal Generator
description: Summons a magical fox that produces Coal when near a Coal block.

name: Guardian Slayer
description: Deals massive bonus damage to Guardians and Elder Guardians.

name: Haste Boost
description: Grants the player the Haste effect for faster mining and swinging (up to Level 3).

name: Pet Speed
description: Significantly increases the movement speed of your Horse or Wolf.
apply_on: Any Horse Armor, Any Nautilus Armor, Wolf Armor

name: Redstone Generator
description: Summons a magical fox that produces Redstone when near a Redstone block.

name: Slime Slayer
description: Deals massive bonus damage to Slimes and Magma Cubes.

name: Auto Carrot Planter
description: Automatically replants carrots from your inventory while walking over tilled farmland.

name: Auto Potato Planter
description: Automatically replants potatoes from your inventory while walking over tilled farmland.

name: Cresselia
description: Increases the damage dealt by your sword during the daytime hours.

name: Darkrai
description: Increases the damage dealt by your sword during the nighttime hours.

name: Dolphins Grace
description: Permanently grants the player the Dolphin's Grace swimming speed boost while wearing these boots.

name: Fangs Sword
description: Summons Evoker-style fangs from the ground to bite enemies upon a successful hit.

name: Infinite Milk Bucket
description: Provides an endless supply of Milk that never runs out.
incompatibility: Infinite Lava Bucket, Infinite Water Bucket

name: Lapis Generator
description: Summons a magical fox that produces Lapis Lazuli when near a Lapis block.

name: Pet Resistance
description: Reduces the amount of damage your pet takes from all sources.
apply_on: Any Horse Armor, Any Nautilus Armor, Wolf Armor

name: Skeleton Slayer
description: Deals massive bonus damage specifically to Skeletons and Strays.

name: Spider Slayer
description: Deals massive bonus damage to Spiders and Cave Spiders.

name: Super Firework
description: Enhances firework rockets for a more powerful.

name: Torrent
description: Boosts the damage dealt by your weapon specifically when it is raining.

name: Upgrade Frost Walker
description: An advanced version of Frost Walker with improved ice formation and longevity.

name: Water Mining
description: Allows the player to mine blocks underwater at normal land-based speeds.

name: Zombie Slayer
description: Deals massive bonus damage to Zombies, Husks, and Drowned.

name: Advance Efficiency
description: A high-tier efficiency upgrade that surpasses the standard Level 5 speed.

name: Advance Riptide
description: An enhanced version of Riptide for more powerful aquatic launches.

name: Anti Gravity
description: Player takes no fall damage.

name: Armor Plus
description: Increases the overall defensive value and toughness of your chestplate.

name: Auto Farmland
description: Automatically tills dirt or grass into farmland when using the hoe.

name: Burning Time
description: Reduces the amount of time the player remains on fire after moving out of a flame.

name: Compact Totem
description: Compresses the energy of Totems, allowing them to be stack more on inventory.

name: Ender Slayer
description: Deals massive bonus damage to Endermen, Shulkers, and Endermites.

name: Equipment Drops Bonus
description: Increases the chance for mobs to drop the armor or weapons they are currently equipped with.

name: Fast Sweeping
description: Reduces the cooldown of the sword's sweep attack for faster area damage.

name: Gold Generator
description: Summons a magical fox that produces Gold when near a Gold block.

name: Illager Slayer
description: Deals massive bonus damage to Vindicators, Pillagers, and Evokers.

name: Infinite Lava Bucket
description: Provides an endless supply of Lava that never runs out.
incompatibility: Infinite Milk Bucket, Infinite Water Bucket

name: Infinite Water Bucket
description: Provides an endless supply of Water that never runs out.
incompatibility: Infinite Milk Bucket, Infinite Lava Bucket

name: Iron Generator
description: Summons a magical fox that produces Iron when near an Iron block.

name: Lightning Sword
description: Adds a significant chance to strike your target with a bolt of lightning upon impact.

name: Lucky
description: Boosts the player's Luck stat specifically for fishing, resulting in better loot.

name: Mob Egg Grinder
description: Increases the chance for mobs to drop their respective Spawn Eggs when killed.

name: Pet Max Health
description: Significantly boosts the maximum HP pool of your pets.
apply_on: Any Horse Armor, Any Nautilus Armor, Wolf Armor

name: Saturation
description: Gradually restores the player's hunger bar over time, reducing the need for food.

name: Self Repair
description: Allows tools to slowly regenerate their own durability; incompatible with Mending.

name: Upgrade Lure
description: A powerful fishing upgrade that drastically reduces the time needed for a bite (Level 5).

name: Upgrade Multishot
description: An enhanced multishot that fires even more projectiles or with greater precision.

name: Upgrade Power
description: A superior bow upgrade that deals damage beyond the standard Power V limit.

name: Advance Sharpness
description: A master-tier sharpness upgrade that increases damage beyond standard levels.

name: Apple of Midas
description: Grants a chance to harvest Golden Apples directly from leaf blocks using Shears.

name: Auto Craft
description: Automatically crafts items from materials in your inventory when equipped.

name: Auto Smelt
description: Automatically smelts ores into ingots and sand into glass as they are mined.

name: Break Reach
description: Increases the maximum distance from which you can reach and break blocks.

name: Chaos Attacker
description: Has a chance to inflict a random negative status effect or curse on hit entities.

name: Chicken Generator
description: Summons a magical fox that produces Chicken-related resources.

name: Diamond Generator
description: Summons a magical fox that produces Diamonds when near a Diamond block.

name: Emerald Generator
description: Summons a magical fox that produces Emeralds when near an Emerald block.

name: Ender Dragon Slayer
description: Deals extreme bonus damage specifically to the Ender Dragon.

name: Exp Mastery
description: Grants a passive stream of experience points to the player over time.

name: Glass Breaker
description: Specialized tool enchantment that allows for the instant and safe harvesting of glass.

name: Inquisitive
description: Increases the amount of experience points dropped by mobs upon death.

name: Item Magnet
description: Automatically pulls nearby dropped items directly into the player's inventory.

name: Max Health
description: Permanently increases the player's maximum health pool while wearing leggings.

name: Mining Experience Bonus
description: Grants additional experience points whenever an ore block is successfully mined.

name: Netherite Generator
description: Summons a magical fox that produces Netherite when near a Netherite block.

name: Pet Regeneration
description: Allows your pets to slowly regenerate health over time while wearing armor.
apply_on: Any Horse Armor, Any Nautilus Armor, Wolf Armor

name: Regeneration Boots
description: Grants the player the Regeneration status effect while wearing these boots.

name: Spawner Breaker
description: A specialized pickaxe enchantment that allows for the breaking and collection of Monster Spawners.

name: Strength Gift
description: Grants the player a temporary Strength buff upon hitting an entity.

name: Super Knockback
description: Sends enemies flying a massive distance backward when struck.

name: Unbreakable
description: Makes the tool completely immune to durability damage.

name: Upgrade Fortune
description: Enhances the Fortune enchantment for even greater resource yields.

name: Upgrade Looting
description: Enhances the Looting enchantment for even greater mob drop yields.

name: Warden Slayer
description: Deals extreme bonus damage specifically to the Warden.

name: Wither Slayer
description: Deals extreme bonus damage specifically to the Wither Boss.

name: Random Enchant
description: A special attribute applied to random books, this enchantment is normally unobtainable.
